cells.value: §1 - Deck evidence anchors (values in $M unless noted)

Classifier-locked Central from workbook_build.psc_1905_classifier across 201 PSC 1905 PIIDs. Tier 0: USAspending /awards/funding/ TAS (OMN/OPN/RDTE funding on a PSC 1905 award is a definitive MRO signal - O&M dollars cannot fund new construction). Tier 1-5: strong/soft MRO keywords + POP length + newbuild hull override. Central = strong + TAS-confirmed + probable. Bounds: $1,553M / $1,904M / $2,057M.
Embedded MRO within PSC 1905 attributed to submarine hulls (dominated by Electric Boat SSN Seam Split Repairs $831M + USS Boise SSN-764 Engineered Overhaul $424M).
Embedded MRO within PSC 1905 attributed to aircraft carriers (CVN-68 class inactivation + CVN-69 Eisenhower FY25 PIA + CVN-74/75 Refueling Complex Overhaul support).
Embedded MRO within PSC 1905 attributed to surface combatants (DDG 1000 BYMP, DDG modernization and cross-class support work).
Embedded MRO within PSC 1905 that could not be attributed to a specific vessel supergroup (general SUPSHIP support, labor support, cross-class mods).
Embedded MRO attributed to SSN (Virginia-class attack subs). Electric Boat SHT Seam Split Repairs + USS Boise SSN-764 Engineered Overhaul.
Embedded MRO attributed to CVN (Nimitz/Ford-class carriers). CVN-68 inactivation + USS Eisenhower FY25 PIA + CVN-74/75 RCOH support at HII Newport News.
Embedded MRO attributed to DDG (Arleigh Burke destroyers). DDG modernization / availability support routed through the shipbuilding PSC.
Embedded MRO attributed to LCS (Littoral Combat Ship). Sustainment task orders routed through PSC 1905.
PSC 1905 embedded MRO - Tier 0 TAS-confirmed subset

Subset of embedded MRO that received OMN / OPN / RDT&E funding on PSC 1905 awards (definitive MRO signal via USAspending /awards/funding/ TAS pull). Appropriation attribution for this subset is known; the remainder imputes to SCN 017-1611.
Per-parent rollup of embedded PSC 1905 MRO (Central basis). GD share driven by Electric Boat SHT Seam Split Repairs + New England Maintenance + Nuclear Regional Maintenance Dept work.
PSC 1905 embedded MRO - Huntington Ingalls Industries
Per-parent rollup of embedded PSC 1905 MRO (Central basis). HII share driven by HII Newport News USS Boise EOH, CVN 68 inactivation, USS Eisenhower FY25 PIA.
Per-parent rollup of embedded PSC 1905 MRO (Central basis). BAE exposure in PSC 1905 is small; dominant BAE MRO share comes from J998 / J999 services-PSC work (captured in Awards).
Per-parent rollup residual (Lockheed Martin, Mills Marine, PCSI, Jered, etc.). Small; used to keep Slide 15 Prime Landscape rollup reconciled with PSC1905_MRO_EMBEDDED total.
Services MRO TAM ($7,067M across 68 J/K/N/M/H/L PSCs) plus embedded PSC 1905 MRO ($1,904M Central). Replaces the prior $7,067M services-only headline deck-wide.

FY25 OMN 1B4B Ship Depot Maintenance total minus "Ship Maintenance By Contract" cost element; approximates public-yard labor reimbursed through NWCF. $12-15B all-in including mission funding customer orders.
FY2025 10-K segment operating income (~5.0% margin on $3.04B).
HII Mission Technologies FY25 service revenue mix
Services share of segment revenue (%); cleanest pure-services public comp to BuildCo in the Navy MRO comp set.
FY2025 MRO-PSC Appropriation Attribution - measured via Treasury TAS (bottom-up)
Primary Navy operating funds on MRO PSCs; funds N-series installs, M2 husbanding, L-series tech rep (all OMN-dominant buckets)
Modernization procurement; J998/J999 Depot Ship Repair is 70% OPN - DSRAs/DPIAs funded as mod installs, not O&M contract maintenance
of which BA-7 Personnel & Command Support Equip (PA 0007)
Installation + modernization electronics / C4ISR / combat system integration equipment
of which BA-8 Spares & Repair Parts (PA 0008)
Spares / consumable repair parts procurement directed at MRO PSC contract actions
of which other BAs (BA-1 Ships Support + Undistributed + other)
BA-1 Ships Support Equipment + undistributed + pre-FY21 optional rows + residual
Strategic Systems Programs - Draper MK7 Trident sustainment ($318M), other SMDC/SSP work; 31% of J-series Equip Maint bucket
APN, WPN, MPN, and other small Navy appropriations that land on MRO PSCs
PDA/PSA warranty work on newbuild LCS/DDG/LPD; minimal RCOH spillover (most RCOH stays on PSC 1905)
Cross-service Air Force funding on Navy MRO PSCs (joint-program K-series mod work)
Coast Guard cutter sustainment contract flow; larger than USCG ISVS alone ($120M) because it includes routine OE depot work
USACE dredge maintenance + cross-service Army RDTE
MRO-PSC FY25 Total (sum of appropriation rows)
Pre-exclusion MRO-PSC universe; Services sheet TAM is ~$339M smaller (shore-base exclusions applied there but not in TAS rollup)
OMN BA-1 Operating Forces - Ship Operations appropriation
Mission and Other Ship Operations (SAG total)
Fleet operations, ship movement, crew training (MSC M&R transfers to 1B4B in FY26)
of which CE 928 Ship Maintenance By Contract
Ship Operational Support and Training (SAG total)
Pre-planning, engineering, submarine + carrier operational support
of which CE 928 Ship Maintenance By Contract
All Navy ship depot maintenance O&M,N customer budget
of which CE 928 Ship Maintenance By Contract
Private-contractor slice within 1B4B (primary MRO contract bucket)
Depot labor, facilities, LCS single-crew support, SUPSHIP
of which CE 928 Ship Maintenance By Contract
Ship Operations BA-1 grand total (SUM of 4 SAG totals)
Top-down Ship Ops funding across all 4 SAGs (incl. public-yard labor cross-charged via NWCF rates)
CE 928 Ship Maintenance By Contract - summed across SAGs
Total private-contractor slice across all 4 Ship Ops SAGs
SCN Capital Ships - 1611N Detail, Exhibit P-1
Base construction authority for SSBN Columbia (Electric Boat + HII NNS)
Concurrent AP for future Columbia hulls
Program-level BA-01 authority = construction + concurrent AP
SSN Block V/VI construction + SFF + Completion PY adjustments
Single-year RCOH execution authority (CVN-74 Stennis); not standing multi-ship program total
CVN-80 USS Enterprise construction (HII Newport News)
CVN-81 USS Doris Miller construction (HII Newport News)
USCG Cutter Sustainment - PC&I In-Service Vessel Sustainment
Coast Guard cutter SLEP / MMA umbrella line (PC&I capital, not OE)
20-year service-life extension for 47-ft motor lifeboat fleet
Medium polar icebreaker SLEP (detail design + procurement)
NWCF Memo - Navy Working Capital Fund (no defined name)
Navy-wide revolving fund; no clean public-shipyard-only line published. Public-yard workload is cross-charged into OMN via NWCF customer rates.
